data.note: Operator-asserted estimate for 2026-05-14 orchestration session. Methodology: 74 commits today (per git log --since '2026-05-13 20:00 UTC'), weighted ~150k tokens/substantial-commit + ~30k/small + conversation overhead (~30 turns at ~125k input + ~15k output each). Range: 3-6M; midpoint 4.2M emitted. Source-of-truth would be Anthropic-side telemetry; this is the best available signal until that wires up.

data.note: Operator-asserted estimate for orchestration work AFTER the 03:05Z 4.2M backfill (commit 8b7e117). Methodology: 47 commits since the backfill (per git log 8b7e117..HEAD --oneline | wc -l). Substantial commits (~12-15): PROP triage e468a5b, AMD-014 em-dash repair 5032629, Ship 1 cron 9e4c1ad, Ship 2 wiring ad3e6b6, PROP-003.a ship 9ff9883, scan-shipped fix c54fa3b, Issue 1 main-flows labels 33809da, Issue 2 wiring verification 9fb0b50, plus deep-diagnostic work (path-conversion bug, em-dash fix, BOM fix, scan-shipped regex collision, etc). Small commits (~30): auto-commits, regen output, single-line fixes. Weighting: ~150k/substantial + ~30k/small + per-turn conversation overhead. Range: 2.5-4M; midpoint 3M. Token-meter-status note: this is option (a) per Issue 3 — instrumentation isn't emitting per-batch. PROP-003.a sidecar (shipped this session) + PROP-003.b integration (queued) will replace this manual emit pattern with real meter reads from quota-status.json.
